fields.label: Session Key
fields.description: Openclaw session key returned by sessions.create

fields.label: User
fields.description: Frappe user who owns this openclaw session

fields.label: Chat Device ID
fields.description: Snapshot of Jarvis Settings.chat_device_id at session-create time. C2 stretch: if the bench re-pairs (device_id changes), all prior session_keys become invalid - even a leaked session_key + leaked agent_token can no longer impersonate after a routine re-pair.

fields.label: Last Seen At
fields.description: Updated when the hook looks up this session (future use)

fields.label: Input Tokens
fields.description: Cumulative input tokens across this session's recorded turns (jarvis.chat.usage).

fields.label: Output Tokens
fields.description: Cumulative output tokens across this session's recorded turns.

fields.label: Run Count
fields.description: Number of turns recorded against this session.

fields.label: Last Total Tokens
fields.description: Snapshot of the gateway's totalTokens (context size) at the last recorded turn / sync.

fields.label: Last Usage At
fields.description: When usage was last recorded or synced for this session.
